description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, dressed in period-style work attire. He wears a long-sleeved shirt under a thick vest, knee-length trousers, and a prominent apron tied at the waist, suggesting a profession such as a butcher, blacksmith, or craftsman. The apron appears well-used, with a pouch or tool hanging from the side. His footwear consists of sturdy shoes and high socks, suitable for standing or working for long periods. The figure is bald with a closely shaven head and has a neutral, slightly stern facial expression. His arms are slightly extended outward, and his posture is upright and relaxed.
description: A stocky adult male in period work attire with a long apron, vest, and sturdy shoes, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Side view showing the apron tied at the waist, the pouch or tool on the hip, and the profile of the head and body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the vest, the seam lines of the trousers, and the bald head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the other profile, apron details, and arm position.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full apron, facial features, and the symmetrical stance of the arms and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: work apron over a long-sleeved shirt, vest, and knee-length trousers with high socks
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
